candidate.name: Tyler Stahl
candidate.headline: Full-stack software engineer and applied AI developer
candidate.summary: Full-stack software engineer and applied AI developer specializing in multi-agent orchestration, hybrid inference routing, structured data extraction, durable state, and human-in-the-loop workflows. Brings 6+ years of production web engineering experience scaling data-dense applications for millions of users, plus counseling and anthropology training that supports stakeholder translation and responsible AI adoption.
candidate.privacy: Public-safe profile. Phone and address are not duplicated in this machine-readable file; consult the downloadable resume only when a human reviewer needs full resume contact details.

projects.name: OpenClaw Multi-Agent Ecosystem
projects.keyFocus: Multi-agent synthesis and reporting on real-world and World of Warcraft commodity markets.
projects.buildNarrative: Autonomous team designed to crawl, parse, and structure market intelligence while preserving state across long-running agentic tasks.

projects.name: Tri-Tier Hybrid Inference Strategy
projects.keyFocus: Cost and latency optimization across cloud and local model tiers.
projects.buildNarrative: Routing system for the hallucination-versus-latency tradeoff, assigning reasoning, verification, and formatting to different model tiers.

projects.name: iBlueprint Embeddings
projects.keyFocus: Data embedding stress-testing for domain-specific retrieval accuracy.
projects.buildNarrative: Collaboration focused on vector data infrastructure and embedding model evaluation for blueprinting workflows.

projects.name: AgentOS: Chief of Staff Agent
projects.keyFocus: Autonomous workflow orchestration for complex, long-running tasks.
projects.buildNarrative: Multi-agent orchestrator designed to manage subagents for feature evaluation, testing, validation, and continuous delivery workflows.

projects.name: Cognitive Bridge
projects.keyFocus: AI personality and user alignment using the OCEAN model.
projects.buildNarrative: Prototype and production pivot for aligning AI agent personality with user traits, including serverless endpoints, typed JSON responses, and durable contextual memory.

experience.evidence: Built multi-agent orchestration, hybrid inference routing, Python ETL pipelines, SQLite state management, and HITL approval workflows.
Built a centralized design component library, Cypress E2E testing pipelines, and compliance-oriented quality improvements.
Worked on React/TypeScript and GraphQL-backed platforms serving 50,000+ clients, 700,000 concurrent visitor spikes, and 11M+ annual users.
Shipped complete full-stack software solutions for B2B clients.

evidenceMatrix.supportingProject: OpenClaw, hybrid inference, AgentOS, Cognitive Bridge
evidenceMatrix.verificationNote: Review project briefs for architecture, routing, durable state, HITL, and productionization details.
